memory:memory/2026-03-16.md:1:11.snippet: # 2026-03-16 - MG wants daily Gmail email + attachment scans wired into the startup summary. - Daily startup brief now runs `bills_scan.py` (attachments scan) + `startup_brief.py` at 08:00 Europe/Lisbon. - Friday 09:00 Europe/Lisbon weekly bills scan already in place (SIMAR water, EDP electric, Vodafone) via `bills_scan.py` and applies to both Gmail accounts. - Gmail IMAP access is now via custom IMAP scripts using local env files; app passwords must be stored locally (not in chat). - Issue: IMAP auth failures were debugged; both accounts tested; need Gmail-side resolution when failures reappear. - Agreement: persist an “ops recap” after each session and maintain an “automation agreements”
